headline: A Look At Sempra (SRE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Sempra (SRE) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Sempra (SRE) has drawn attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at $98.88. The move has investors revisiting its regulated utility footprint across California, Texas, and broader energy infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Sempra. The recent 5.7% 30 day share price return and 10.2% year to date share price return suggest momentum has been building, while the 49.7% one year total shareholder return points to a strong...
